case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RYAN D HAGEN

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HAGEN, RYAN D SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-17-2019
